estimators.name: Brad Harder
estimators.title: Manager, Preconstruction (formerly Construction Estimator)
personalization_hooks: Former Kiewit — progressed from QC Technician to Estimating Engineer, Lead Electrical Field Engineer, Lead Estimator, Project Engineer. Heavy infrastructure background brought into a 110-year Manitoba commercial builder
Was Senior Estimator at SADB and Building Services Estimator at McMahon Services prior to Bockstael — values rigorous estimating discipline
Now leads ALL preconstruction at Bockstael — decides the bid list. Highest-leverage single contact in this list of 30
Bockstael is 100+ years old, family-owned-feel — pitch Ashrah's structured painter training program as 'long-term reliability' to match their multigenerational reputation
His Kiewit background means he respects subs that bring data and forecasting — lead with the 6-day delay forecasting tool

fallback_contact.name: Bockstael office
fallback_contact.title: Reception / Estimating
fallback_contact.rationale: Bockstael also has a posted Estimator job (https://bockstael.com/bockstael_careers/estimator/) — they may have additional junior estimators reporting to Brad. If Brad isn't reachable, ask reception for the estimating department.
